name: heheboi
intends:
import asyncio
import signal
import time
import os

class EventTriggers:
    def __init__(self):
        self.proc = None
        self.file = None
        self.spec = ["-m", "60", "--low-power", "off", "--audio"]

        self.output_dir = "/home/hk/prog/vocal-link-dashboard/storage"
        os.makedirs(self.output_dir, exist_ok=True)

    def _new_file(self):
        ts = time.strftime("%Y-%m-%d_%H%M%S")
        return f"{self.output_dir}/screencast-{ts}.mp4"

    async def _start(self, extra):
        if self.proc and self.proc.returncode is None:
            return

        self.file = self._new_file()

        self.proc = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
            "wl-screenrec",
            *self.spec,
            *extra,
            "-f",
            self.file,
            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.DEVNULL,
            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.DEVNULL,
        )

    async def onStart(self):
        await self._start([])

    async def onStop(self):
        if self.proc and self.proc.returncode is None:
            proc = self.proc
            file_path = self.file

            proc.send_signal(signal.SIGINT)

            # release immediately (no blocking)
            self.proc = None

            async def finalize():
                await proc.wait()

                if file_path:
                    notify = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
                        "notify-send",
                        "-A", "open=Open location",
                        "Recording Stopped",
                        f"Saved at {file_path}",
                        stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,
                    )

                    stdout, _ = await notify.communicate()
                    action = stdout.decode().strip()

                    if action == "open":
                        await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(
                            "nautilus",
                            self.file
                        )

            asyncio.create_task(finalize())

    async def onPause(self):
        if self.proc and self.proc.returncode is None:
            self.proc.send_signal(signal.SIGSTOP)

    async def onResume(self):
        if self.proc and self.proc.returncode is None:
            self.proc.send_signal(signal.SIGCONT)
